ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school corporation */,
  "corp_name" TEXT /* Name of the school corporation */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment of students in the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school district */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_demographics" (
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school corporation */,
  "american_indian" INTEGER /* Number of American Indian students enrolled */,
  "asian_pacific_islander" INTEGER /* Number of Asian or Pacific Islander students enrolled */,
  "black" INTEGER /* Number of Black students enrolled */,
  "hispanic" INTEGER /* Number of Hispanic students enrolled */,
  "multiracial" INTEGER /* Number of Multiracial students enrolled */,
  "white" INTEGER /* Number of White students enrolled */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Number of students by gender */,
  "disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of students with disabilities */,
  "english_learners" INTEGER /* Number of students who are English learners */,
  "low_income" INTEGER /* Number of students from low-income families */,
  "homeless" INTEGER /* Number of homeless students */,
  "foster_care" INTEGER /* Number of students in foster care */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corp_id", "year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_demographics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("corp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_stats" (
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school corporation */,
  "free_meals" INTEGER /* Number of students receiving free meals */,
  "reduced_price_meals" INTEGER /* Number of students receiving reduced price meals */,
  "paid_meals" INTEGER /* Number of students paying full price for meals */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the meal statistics */,
  "free_meals_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of students receiving free meals */,
  "reduced_price_meals_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of students receiving reduced price meals */,
  "paid_meals_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of students paying full price for meals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corp_id", "year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_stats_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("corp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the district */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_enrollments" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school district */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment of students in the district */,
  "free_meals" INTEGER /* Total number of students receiving free meals */,
  "reduced_price_meals" INTEGER /* Total number of students receiving reduced price meals */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment statistics */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Number of students by gender */,
  "disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of students with disabilities */,
  "english_learners" INTEGER /* Number of students who are English learners */,
  "low_income" INTEGER /* Number of students from low-income families */,
  "homeless" INTEGER /* Number of homeless students */,
  "foster_care" INTEGER /* Number of students in foster care */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the state */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the enrollment year record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment */,
  "corp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school corporation */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment for that year */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific school */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Number of students by gender */,
  "disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of students with disabilities */,
  "english_learners" INTEGER /* Number of students who are English learners */,
  "low_income" INTEGER /* Number of students from low-income families */,
  "homeless" INTEGER /* Number of homeless students */,
  "foster_care" INTEGER /* Number of students in foster care */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_years_corp_id FOREIGN KEY ("corp_id") REFERENCES schools ("corp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_years_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("corp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
